description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a robust, angular body and a prominent roof-mounted light bar. The vehicle is painted in a two-tone color scheme, with a lighter side panel and darker upper and lower sections. The words 'BECKLEY POLICE' are clearly marked on the side doors in large, bold letters, accompanied by additional smaller text and department insignia. The car features standard police equipment such as side mirrors, alloy wheels, and a rear trunk, with visible emergency lights on the roof. The windows are tinted, and the overall build suggests reinforced materials typical of law enforcement vehicles. The rear of the car displays further police markings and department information.
description: A modern, two-tone police sedan with a roof-mounted light bar, bold 'POLICE' markings, and department insignia on the sides and rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, and roof-mounted light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting 'BECKLEY POLICE' markings, side mirrors, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying taillights, rear window, and additional police markings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible 'POLICE' markings and department text.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle has 'BECKLEY POLICE' in large, bold white letters on both side doors, with additional smaller text beneath. The rear of the car also displays 'BECKLEY POLICE DEPARTMENT' in white. The markings are clear, official, and easily identifiable as law enforcement.
attribute_emergency_lights: A rectangular, roof-mounted light bar is present, likely containing red and blue emergency lights, positioned centrally on the roof.
attribute_police_insignia: No distinct police insignia, badges, shields, or emblems are visible beyond the text markings.
